CustomField.description: GTMS-4100 - Set by Zoominfo/Ringlead Integration when the Lead to Contact match/enrichment was updated on any related contact. NOTE: Not all related contacts would be updated on this date. Contacts with same Target Enrichment Date would apply.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Set by Zoominfo/Ringlead Integration when the Lead to Contact match/enrichment was updated on any related contact. NOTE: Not all related contacts would be updated on this date. Contacts with same Target Enrichment Date would apply.
CustomField.label: Contact Target Enrichment Date
